status: in-progress — Dossier theme feature parity sprint
completed_this_session: Universal layout fix for Dossier theme: DossierRootView now owns selectedKB state, branches on horizontalSizeClass — NavigationStack on iPhone, NavigationSplitView on iPad
DossierKBListView: @State selectedKB → @Binding selectedKB; .toolbar(.hidden, for: .navigationBar) suppresses empty nav bar over custom masthead
DossierKBDetailView: switched from VStack+DossierTabBar to .safeAreaInset(edge:.bottom) — tab bar now floats above home indicator in all orientations/platforms
DossierTabBar: .padding(.bottom, 28) → .padding(.bottom, 8) — was double-stacking with home indicator clearance in landscape
Build verified clean on iPhone 16 and iPad Pro 13-inch simulators

Documented 30 Dossier feature gaps across 4 categories (D-KBL1-8, D-DOC1-13, D-CHAT1-9, D-WF1-4)
